title: aira flexuosa subsp. setacea
intro: Aira flexuosa subsp. setacea, also known as Hair Bent or Hair Brome, is a subspecies of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. It is native to various regions, including Europe and Asia, and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and treating urinary tract infections, due to its rich content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Aira flexuosa subsp. setacea can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to leverage its medicinal properties.
